prose.en: Plan for the resumption of {param:cp-02.03_odp.01} mission and business functions within {param:cp-02.03_odp.02} of contingency plan activation.

guidance.en: Organizations may choose to conduct contingency planning activities to resume mission and business functions as part of business continuity planning or as part of business impact analyses. Organizations prioritize the resumption of mission and business functions. The time period for resuming mission and business functions may be dependent on the severity and extent of the disruptions to the system and its supporting infrastructure.

prose.en: the resumption of {param:cp-02.03_odp.01} mission and business functions are planned for within {param:cp-02.03_odp.02} of contingency plan activation.

objects.en: procedures addressing contingency operations for the system
Organizational personnel with contingency planning and plan implementation responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
organizational personnel with knowledge of requirements for mission and business functions
Organizational processes for resumption of missions and business functions

guidelines.en: the contingency plan activation time period within which to resume mission and business functions is defined;

nist-withdrawal.label: CP-02(04)
nist-withdrawal.title: Resume All Mission and Business Functions
